title: MCA ने Companies (Accounting Standards) Amendment Rules, 2026 जारी किए, AS-22 में OECD Pillar Two Alignment के लिए अपडेट
content:
# MCA ने Companies (Accounting Standards) Amendment Rules, 2026 जारी किए, AS-22 में OECD Pillar Two Alignment के लिए अपडेट

Ek important update hai for all Chartered Accountants and businesses in India! Government ne **Companies (Accounting Standards) Amendment Rules, 2026** announce kiye hain, jismein Accounting Standard (AS) 22 – Accounting for Taxes on Income mein significant changes kiye gaye hain. Ye amendments OECD ke Global Minimum Tax Regime, yaani "Pillar Two" alignment ke liye hain.

Yeh ek crucial कदम hai India ke financial reporting framework ko international taxation norms ke saath align karne ki disha mein.

*   **Notification Details:** Yeh amendments Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) ne Notification No. G.S.R. 169(E) ke through, March 10, 2026 ko notify kiye hain.
*   **Key Amendment in AS-22:** Ab enterprises ko Pillar Two income taxes se related deferred tax assets aur liabilities recognize ya disclose karne ki zaroorat nahin hogi. Yeh AS-22 ke usual requirements se ek specific exception hai.
*   **New Disclosure Requirements:** Deferred tax recognition se exemption ke bawajood, companies ko enhanced transparency ke liye kuch naye disclosures dene honge (Paragraphs 32A se 32D). Ismein yeh disclose karna hoga ki unhone deferred tax exception apply kiya hai aur Pillar Two income taxes se related current tax expense/income ko separately show karna hoga.
*   **Exposure Disclosure:** Agar Pillar Two legislation enacted ya substantively enacted hai but abhi tak effective nahin hai, toh companies ko financial statements ke users ko unke potential exposure ko samajhne mein madad karne ke liye qualitative aur quantitative information provide karni hogi.
*   **Effective Dates:** Paragraphs 2A aur 32A immediately aur retrospectively apply honge. Jabki, Paragraphs 32B se 32D annual reporting periods jo April 1, 2025 ko ya uske baad shuru ho rahe hain, unpar apply honge.
*   **Transitional Relief:** Companies ko interim reporting periods ke liye, jo March 31, 2026 ko ya usse pehle end ho rahe hain, in naye disclosures ko provide karne ki zaroorat nahin hai.

Yeh amendments multinational enterprises (MNEs) ke liye tax accounting, disclosure requirements, aur financial reporting strategy par direct impact daalenge.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://drabhishekgandhi.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Companies-Accounting-Standards-Amendment-Rules-2026.pdf)

*Published on: 17 March 2026*
